<!--
Thanks for contributing. Keep PRs focused — one resource (or one tightly related group) per PR
where possible. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full scope and entry format.
-->

## What this PR does

<!-- Briefly describe the change: which resource(s) added, link fixed, or wording corrected. -->

## Entry format

For added resources, confirm each new bullet follows:

```markdown
- **[Title or project name](https://example.com/path)** — One concise sentence describing the contribution and why it matters for RL-for-agents readers.
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The resource is directly relevant to reinforcement learning for agents, and the bullet names the RL signal or interaction loop it concerns.
- [ ] Placed under the most specific existing section (or a new section was discussed in an issue first).
- [ ] Link is the canonical source (arXiv `/abs/`, ACL Anthology, official page, or canonical repository) and resolves — no shortened or referral links.
- [ ] One neutral, factual one-line description — no marketing superlatives.
- [ ] Not a duplicate of an existing entry.
- [ ] Description uses the existing wording conventions of the surrounding list.
